overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing a character walking through Los Santos. The character crosses a brick-paved intersection, walks along tree-lined sidewalks past the iconic MazeBank billboard, and crosses another busy intersection toward the downtown area with tall glass buildings.

events.description: character steps off curb and begins crossing the brick-paved intersection
silver sedan and black muscle car pass through the intersection as character crosses

agents.ego_description: walking across the brick crosswalk from the sidewalk corner toward the opposite side

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in orange striped shirt standing at the corner

entered.detail: multi-story residential complex with balconies and palm trees
red brick patterned pedestrian crossing with white lines
large commercial billboard with red sports car advertisement

segments.scene_description: The character starts at a street corner and crosses a brick-paved intersection. A beige apartment building dominates the right side while a pedestrian in a striped shirt stands on the left. Cars pass through the intersection as the character walks toward the far sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: tree-lined residential sidewalk with retaining wall

events.description: moves from open intersection onto shaded sidewalk with concrete retaining wall
character passes a group of three pedestrians walking in the opposite direction

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the concrete sidewalk next to a grassy retaining wall and mature trees

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking toward the camera on the sidewalk

entered.detail: low concrete wall with grass and trees above separating sidewalk from elevated area
mature trees with dense green canopy providing partial shade
bright yellow fire hydrant on the sidewalk edge

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a residential sidewalk shaded by mature trees. A concrete retaining wall runs along the left side while the MazeBank billboard remains visible ahead. The character passes other pedestrians and a yellow fire hydrant as the environment transitions to a more landscaped area.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial sidewalk with flowering landscaping and parked vehicles

events.description: passing the MazeBank billboard area, entering more commercial zone with taller buildings
sidewalk curves slightly right as character approaches the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking past landscaped areas with flowering bushes and rows of parked cars

entered.detail: tall modern cylindrical skyscraper with reflective glass facade dominating the skyline
purple and blue hydrangea bushes in landscaped median
large purple commercial billboard visible above the trees

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the commercial sidewalk, passing vibrant flowering bushes and parked vehicles. The MazeBank billboard moves to the left as the character approaches a major intersection dominated by a tall circular glass tower ahead. The environment becomes more urban with billboards and commercial signage.

scene_state.functional_zone: major downtown intersection with tall commercial buildings

events.description: character stops at street corner, waits briefly, then steps into the crosswalk
character crosses the multi-lane street as vehicles including a black SUV and taco van pass by

agents.ego_description: stops at the corner then crosses the wide intersection toward the circular tower, weaving through traffic

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving through the intersection as character crosses

entered.detail: large overhead traffic signal structure spanning the intersection
multi-story parking structure with open levels and glass facade
white food truck with yellow and red taco branding

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a major downtown intersection dominated by the tall circular glass tower. After stopping at the corner, the character crosses the wide street as traffic including a black SUV and taco van moves through. The scene opens up to reveal a multi-story parking garage and large traffic signal gantries.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a residential neighborhood that gradually transforms into a dense, urban downtown district. It begins at a street corner, crossing a brick-paved intersection past a beige apartment building and passing pedestrians. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts to a shaded residential sidewalk lined with mature trees and a concrete retaining wall, keeping the MazeBank billboard in sight. The environment then transitions into a commercial zone, passing vibrant flowering bushes and parked cars as the billboard moves to the left and a tall circular glass tower emerges ahead. Finally, the camera follows the character across a wide downtown intersection filled with traffic, including a black SUV and a taco van, before opening up to reveal a multi-story parking garage and large traffic signal gantries.
